series_metadata.series_description: Contains records of parole and probation cases of offenders who transfer to Ohio from other states for supervision. The sending state retains original file. The compact file contains face sheet information and investigation reports; reports of parole or probation progress and copies of authorization of release from supervision as they are received from the sending state. Contain medical, psychological, social summaries and general correspondence relating to the supervision of the parolee or probationer.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Files of parolees and probationers released form supervision. Kept in paper form and not microfilmed. Retained final release from suoervision
